CustomField.description: This Condition indicates that any of the non Problem Code Fault Codes (Action, Completion, Installation) are selected which have "Complaint Required" checked will enable the Complaint Validations.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This Condition indicates that any of the non Problem Code Fault Codes (Action, Completion, Installation) are selected which have "Complaint Required" checked will enable the Complaint Validations.
CustomField.label: Condition: Fault Code Complaint Reqd
